name: Salmon Roasted with Cilantro Pesto
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
1 large ripe tomato, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place the garlic, cilantro, 2 tablespoons of the olive oil, lime juice, salt, and pepper in a blender or food processor. Blend until creamy.
3. Brush remaining oil onto a baking pan or sheet. Place salmon in the pan.
4. Spread cilantro mixture on salmon, scatter tomato over it, and sprinkle with additional salt and pepper.
5. Bake uncovered until salmon is cooked through (check by piercing the thickest part with a thin-bladed knife), about 12 to 15 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
